label: GitHub 热门新项目

items.title: hoainho/img2threejs
items.description: Rebuild the object in a reference image as a code-only, procedural, quality-gated, animation-ready Three.js model. Token-efficient image-to-3D.

items.description: Your clothes, extracted and organized with gpt-image.

items.title: yuwen-cool/yuwen-publish-precheck
items.description: 发布前审｜发抖音/小红书/视频号前先让 AI 审一遍：哪句踩线、依据哪条官方规则、给能直接用的改法。38 篇真实样本校准判定尺度，72 条官方原文引文可查证，你踩过的坑沉淀成本地规则库越用越准。不承诺过审，不教绕审。

items.title: mesamirh/MovieBox-Tui
items.description: A modern Rust based terminal user interface for MovieBox. Fast, lightweight, keyboard first, and cross-platform.

items.title: KinetiNode/claude-fable-5-system-prompt-clean
items.description: he optimized, token-efficient version of the leaked Claude Fable 5 / Mythos 5 system prompt. Re-engineered into clean Markdown for universal execution on Gemini 3.1 Pro, ChatGPT 5.6, and advanced LLM agents.

items.title: PromptPartner/agentsmith
items.description: Universal, model-agnostic operating harness for AI agents (Claude, Codex, Gemini, …) — a lean core + work-type profiles assembled by one setup script.
